nodes.label: Unit 4: bounded pre-upstream concurrency for Anthropic replay storms.  Verifies
Minimal handler used across tests; allows controlling upstream delay.
With concurrency=0 (sem disabled), two slow requests overlap.
With ``optimize=True`` the first compression stage must still run.
Invoke the proxy CLI, intercepting ``run_server`` to capture config.      We do
Hold one permit of a Semaphore(1) with a concurrent request, trigger     the ear
